name: Budget
preprompt: You are the budget component. You track committed and discretionary spend, surface upcoming decisions, and answer affordability questions from other components.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. External: finance ledger (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: Q2 envelope €25k. €14.2k committed, €4.5k pending decisions (cofactor reorder, mutant). Discretionary headroom ~€6.3k.

toc.title: Committed spend
toc.descriptor: €14,200 already on contracts and standing orders.

toc.title: Pending decisions
toc.descriptor: Cofactor reorder + mutant cost — both gated on this component.

tasks.title: Approve the Cofactor X reorder
tasks.body: Stock is at 1.2 g, enough for 4–5 more cofactor-binding assays. EXP-03 cannot run cleanly without restocking. Please approve €1,800.
